Done. Here's the summary:

## orchestrator-actions-ui → committed

The ponder was already fully synthesized into `v16-orchestrator-ui` during a prior session. The commit flow just needed to formally link them.

**Milestone:** `v16-orchestrator-ui` — Orchestrator UI — Actions page with real-time status and webhook history

**4 features (all in flight):**

| Feature | Phase | Scope |
|---|---|---|
| `orchestrator-actions-routes` | implementation | GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH actions REST API |
| `orchestrator-webhook-events` | implementation | WEBHOOK_EVENTS redb table, ring buffer (500), GET route |
| `orchestrator-sse-bridge` | implementation | `ActionStateChanged` SSE variant, sentinel file watcher |
| `orchestrator-actions-page` | qa | Three-section UI, sidebar nav, edit modal, recurrence text input |

**Next:** `/sdlc-run-wave v16-orchestrator-ui` to drive the in-flight features forward.
